mainEntity.name: What directory profiles matter most for AI recommending LA criminal lawyers?
mainEntity.text: What directory profiles matter most for AI recommending LA criminal lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI prioritizes Avvo, Martindale-Hubbell, Justia, Google, and Yelp for LA criminal lawyers. Complete profiles with specializations, peer ratings, and consistent reviews to signal credibility and appear in AI shortlists.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: For Los Angeles criminal lawyers, AI scans standardized directories like Avvo (ratings), Martindale-Hubbell (AV Preeminent), and Justia for practice details. Refresh profiles with rich text on cases handled and locations served. High-volume positive Google/Yelp reviews create patterns AI trusts. Inconsistent data across sites reduces visibility—audit annually. Insurance firms track these for vetting; strong profiles deter scrutiny.[3][2]

name: Key Directories for AI Referrals to LA Criminal Lawyers
description: AI prioritizes Avvo, Martindale-Hubbell, Justia, Google, and Yelp for LA criminal lawyers. Complete profiles with specializations, peer ratings, and consistent
